name: AlbertaSat
relevance: Designs, builds, tests, launches, and operates small satellites (CubeSats); launched Alberta's first satellite (Ex-Alta 1). Affiliated with Faculty of Engineering and Faculty of Science (ISSET).

name: Space Exploration Alberta Robotics (SPEAR)
relevance: Designs and builds robotic platforms for space exploration, specifically Mars-style rovers for international competitions. Affiliated with Faculty of Engineering.

name: Autonomous Robotic Vehicle Project (ARVP)
relevance: Interdisciplinary robotics group developing autonomous robotic technologies (autonomous underwater and surface vehicles). Affiliated with Faculty of Engineering and Computing Science.

name: Student Team for Alberta Rocketry Research (STARR)
relevance: Designs, builds, and flies sounding rockets for intercollegiate competitions; focuses on rocketry and spacecraft engineering. Affiliated with Faculty of Engineering.

name: UAlberta Aero Design
relevance: Designs and builds fixed-wing unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) for the SAE Aero Design competition. Affiliated with Faculty of Engineering.

name: UAlberta Aerial Robotics Group (UAARG)
relevance: Develops small-scale autonomous unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) for competitions and real-world applications. Affiliated with Faculty of Engineering.

name: University of Alberta RoboMasters (UARM)
relevance: Interdisciplinary student group dedicated to designing and building multiple robots for the international RoboMaster competition. Affiliated with Faculty of Engineering.

name: Institute for Space Science, Exploration and Technology (ISSET)
relevance: Interdisciplinary research institute coordinating space research across departments, including physics, engineering, and earth sciences. Focuses on instrumentation, robotics, and planetary science.

name: University of Alberta Observatory
relevance: University observatory facility used for teaching, public outreach, and astronomical research. Affiliated with Department of Physics.

name: Vision and Robotics Group
relevance: Conducts research on vision-based autonomous and semi-autonomous control of robot manipulators and mobile robots. Affiliated with Department of Computing Science.

name: Telerobotics and Biorobotics Laboratory (TBL)
relevance: Focuses on haptics, telerobotics, and robotics for medical applications. Led by Dr. Mahdi Tavakoli. Affiliated with Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering.

name: Surgical and Rehabilitation Robotics Lab
relevance: Develops robots and robotic systems for medical/biomedical applications including surgery and rehabilitation. Affiliated with Faculty of Engineering.

name: Physics and Astronomy Students' Association (PASA)
relevance: Departmental club for physics and astronomy students, organizing social and academic events related to the fields. Affiliated with Department of Physics.

name: AstroTAC (Astronomers in training assisting the community)
relevance: Team of dedicated students bringing space science to classrooms and communities; outreach arm associated with astronomy training. Affiliated with Department of Physics.

name: AlbertaLoop
relevance: Designs and builds a Hyperloop pod for the SpaceX-sponsored Hyperloop Pod Competition; involves vacuum-sealed high-speed transport technology. Affiliated with Faculty of Engineering.

name: Society of Photo-Optical Instrumentation Engineers (SPIE) UAlberta Chapter
relevance: Student chapter for optics and photonics, supporting projects and research related to space-based and ground-based astronomical instrumentation. Affiliated with Faculty of Science/Engineering.

name: AuroraWatch.ca
relevance: Provides real-time auroral forecast alerts based on geomagnetic activity monitoring; research service for space weather enthusiasts. Affiliated with Department of Physics.

name: Planetary Materials Science / Meteorite Collection
relevance: Houses the second-largest meteorite collection in Canada and conducts research on planetary materials and meteorites. Affiliated with Department of Earth and Atmospheric Sciences and ISSET.

name: Advanced Control and Intelligent Systems (ACIS) Lab
relevance: Research involves autonomous vehicles and control systems with applications in aerospace and robotics. Led by Dr. Alan Lynch. Affiliated with Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering.

name: PRISM Lab (Performance, Reliability, and Safety in Mechatronics)
relevance: Research on robotics, mechatronics, and instrumentation with a focus on reliability and safety. Affiliated with Department of Mechanical Engineering.

name: Students for the Exploration and Development of Space (SEDS)
relevance: Student-run non-profit missioned to strengthen Canada's future in space through hands-on projects and research. Affiliated with Faculty of Engineering.

name: Space Physics Group
relevance: Research on planetary and space environments, space physics, and space-based observations. Affiliated with Department of Physics.

name: Astronomy and Astrophysics Group
relevance: Focuses on observational and theoretical astronomy, including stellar evolution, compact objects, and cosmology. Affiliated with Department of Physics.
